name: Giphy
description: Search millions of GIFs, get trending content, and translate words into GIFs using the Giphy API. Free tier available.

auth.hint: Create a free app at developers.giphy.com and copy the API Key. Use "dc6zaTOxFJmzC" as a beta key for basic testing.

tools.name: search_gifs
tools.description: Search Giphy for GIFs matching a keyword.

params.name: rating
params.description: Content rating: g, pg, pg-13, or r

params.name: lang
params.description: 2-letter language code, e.g. en or pt

tools.name: get_trending_gifs
tools.description: Get the currently trending GIFs on Giphy.

params.name: rating
params.description: Content rating: g, pg, pg-13, or r

tools.name: translate_to_gif
tools.description: Translate a word or phrase to a single best-matching GIF.

params.name: s
params.description: Word or phrase to translate, e.g. "excited" or "good morning"
